ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "REQUEST_START", appName: p("current.app.name") default "parking-experience-api", method: attributes.method default "", path: attributes.requestPath default "", correlationId: attributes.headers."X-Correlation-Id" default (vars.correlationId default ""), queryParams: attributes.queryParams default {}, timestamp: now() }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "REQUEST_END", appName: p("current.app.name") default "parking-experience-api", method: attributes.method default "", path: attributes.requestPath default "", correlationId: attributes.headers."X-Correlation-Id" default (vars.correlationId default ""), status: vars.httpStatus default 200, timestamp: now() }
